title: Replant+
description: A lightweight and server-friendly mod that automatically replants crops the moment you harvest them.
body:
📄 Description :

Replant+ is a clean and efficient auto-replanting mod for Minecraft.
Whenever you break a fully-grown crop, the mod instantly places the seed back into the farmland — no extra inputs, no settings, no hassle.

Designed for SMP players, farmers, and grinders, Replant+ saves time and keeps your farms 
perfectly working without macros or illegal clients.
Also toggleable button 'R' or You can customize
